description: First rigorous protocol for UAV-to-UGV traversability experiments. Class 10 is treated as passable road; all other label ids are non-passable for the initial binary task.
class_0_note: Label id 0 appears as black background/unlabeled in visualization. It is not treated as passable in this protocol.

protocol_split.group_id_rule: sample id prefix before the first underscore, e.g. 000001_070 -> 000001

depth_generation.note: Use .npy float32 depth as the authoritative RGB-D training input. The 16-bit PNG and preview PNG are convenience artifacts only.
